scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && concurrently -n "web,auth,core,notification" -c "blue,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web -- -H 127.0.0.1" "npm run dev --workspace=services/auth" "npm run dev --workspace=services/core" "npm run dev --workspace=services/notification"
scripts.dev:turbo: docker-compose --profile default up -d --force-recreate && npx turbo run dev
scripts.dev:fresh: npm run clean && npm run build:packages && npm run dev
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=packages/observability && npm run build --workspace=packages/messaging
scripts.stop:all: docker compose -p rootcause --profile default down -v && pkill -9 -f 'ts-node' || true && pkill -9 -f 'ts-node-dev' || true
scripts.kill:services: pkill -9 -f 'tsx' || true && pkill -9 -f 'ts-node-dev' || true && pkill -9 -f 'ts-node' || true
